operational_scenes.scene_title: Manual Recovery and Charging of Dead AGVs
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Explain manual procedures for handling completely dead AGVs
operational_intents: Describe steps to remove dead AGV from system
Explain manual charging process using a dolly
Highlight challenges with dead AGVs and manual intervention
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Extract detailed manual recovery steps and conditions
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Focus on manual intervention for dead AGVs

operational_scenes.scene_title: Monitoring AGV Battery Levels and Charging Thresholds
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Explain battery charge levels and system behavior thresholds
operational_intents: Identify battery percentage indicators and their meanings
Describe system responses at various battery levels
Advise on avoiding low battery states to prevent downtime
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Extract battery level thresholds and system responses
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Clarify battery management and system behavior

operational_scenes.scene_title: Procedures for Manual Charging and System Boot-up
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Discuss manual charging requirements and system boot process
operational_intents: Clarify if AGV must be on to charge manually
Explain automatic boot-up when sufficient charge is reached
Recommend best practices for charging and system reintegration
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Extract manual charging conditions and boot-up behavior
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Detail manual charging and system restart process

operational_scenes.primary_intent: Explain system self-charging and importance of charger management
operational_intents: Describe how AGV charges itself after manual intervention
Highlight importance of enabling chargers after removal
Discuss impact of charger availability on charging time
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Extract system charging behavior and charger management tips
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Focus on system charging and charger usage

operational_scenes.scene_title: Transition to Break and Team Coordination
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Conclude RMS section and coordinate team break
operational_intents: Signal end of RMS training section
Discuss timing and need for break
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Extract session transition and team coordination cues
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Mark end of topic and manage session flow
